title: Senior PMO (Core Banking)
description:
Position Summary:

We are seeking experienced PMOs (Core Banking) tojoin our dynamic team. You will be responsiblefor overseeing overall project progress. The PMO role supports theorganization’s project portfolio by ensuring governance, consistency, andefficiency in project execution. This position provides oversight, reporting,and guidance to project teams while aligning initiatives with strategicobjectives. This role requires strong organizational skills, financial acumen,and the ability to collaborate across multiple teams including vendors and clients.

The PMO will helpestablish the foundation for successful execution of the full transformationprogram.

Roles& Responsibilities:

·      Supportplanning and execution of pre-study activities across multiple workstreams

·      Developand maintain project plans, dashboards, and milestone trackers

·      Facilitatestakeholder meetings, workshops, and steering committees

·      Trackand report progress, risks, issues, and dependencies

·      Ensuredocumentation of scope, requirements, and decisions

·      Coordinatewith business analysts, architects, and vendor teams

·      Assistin resource planning and budget forecasting

·      Maintainalignment with regulatory, compliance, and audit requirements

·      Driveexecutive-level reporting and presentations

·      Supportchange management and communication efforts

RequiredSkills:

·      Bachelor’sdegree in business, IT, or related field

·      10+years of experience in project management or PMO roles

·      Must have in-depth experience in leading core bankingor financial services transformation projects

·      Experienced in leading large-scale transformations as PM or PMO

·      Strongunderstanding of project governance frameworks (e.g., Agile, Waterfall, Hybrid)

·      Proficiencyin tools like MS Project, JIRA, Confluence, Excel, PowerPoint

·      Strong Corporate banking domain knowledge inLending/Trade Finance/CASA/Payment

·      Efficient communication internally and externally withall stakeholders

·      Proven record of CxO level stakeholder management

PreferredQualifications:

·      Experiencein a client-facing role, with a proven track record of managing clientrelationships.

·      PMP,PRINCE2, or similar certification

·      Excellentcommunication and stakeholder management skills

·      Analyticalmindset with attention to detail

·      Be able to confidently work in a fast-paced,multi-country environment

·      Experiencewith vendor coordination and SOW management

PreferredEducation:

·      Bachelor’sdegree/master’s degree in information technology, Computer Science orequivalent work experience, or combination

SalaryExpectations: SGD 12,000to SGD 15,000 per month

ContractTerm: 6-month contract to start, with opportunity for extension based onperformance.

postedCompany.description: The Company's principal activity is manpower contracting services with other information technology and computer services.
